generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about expanded security powers, but after what we've seen lately, I think we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. My neighbor's kid works in counterterrorism and says the current rules tie their hands too much. We can't afford to be naive about these threats. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
